## v0.1.3

- Update the Raycast publish workflow so the first Raycast Pull Request is created with the official `npm run publish` command and later publishes update the open Pull Request through a logged sparse checkout update to the `ext/prompt-launcher` branch.
- Keep All Prompt Sets usable when some Prompt Sets cannot be read, and show unavailable Prompt Sets separately.
- Stabilize preview rendering by relying on Raycast List selection and keeping preview loading quiet.
